ideation: This animation sequence aims to visually represent the emptiness and vacancy signified by the Japanese vacancy button emoji (🈳).  The animation will focus on a gradual opening and closing of the arms, mirroring the idea of something opening up to become empty, then closing again.  We will use the robot's arm mechanics to convey a sense of space and openness. The animation will be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the stillness and emptiness represented by the emoji. Frame 1 shows both arms at the side in a neutral position.  In frame 2, the arms open slightly outward, conveying a sense of space opening. Frame 3 shows the arms fully open in a wide gesture, representing the maximum emptiness. Frame 4 reverses the motion, arms closing halfway. Frame 5 shows the arms returning to their original neutral position.

frames.beat: arms hang at sides, empty space
arms open slightly, a hint of vacancy
arms open wide, a vast emptiness revealed
arms begin to close, the space recedes
arms return to rest, all is vacant
